promoted_slices.note: WSL-mispathed agent worktrees (c/, d/ literal dirs) reconciled into canonical and promoted: engine ring, recovered MASTER_PDF/workbench/summaries, PaneForge product, proof-kernel deploy kit.

pip-installable cqecmplx-forge v0.3.0: unified cqecmplx namespace + compat ring; lattice_forge union (PROOF 54 + PartsFactory 116, 9 diverged preserved); ForgeFactory/ReForge/Rhenium lineage; engine ring. Fresh-venv verified, stdlib-only.

Curated best forms of all 9 diverged lattice_forge modules (adjudications in MERGE_LEDGER); predictor fork split into rule30_predictor + rule30_spectral_predictor; merged init exposes both lines; cqecmplx-verify console script (6/6); fixed ChromaForge cache-poisoning bug found by the verifier.

Two-tier storage law: dual-lane (fermionic/bosonic) live memory with kappa event-count decay; 10-chained-activation promotion -> BIRTH-receipted lib crystal; finish() compression event walks receipt chain to bare active spine and crystallizes it; CrystalVault append-only backend (crystal-form-only persistence) with self-reorganizing consolidation (meta-crystals, full provenance, MDHG-rung levels). cqecmplx-verify 7/7.

RGB=LCR pixel layer: pixel as 8-plane ribbon (lossless roundtrip), G channel = gluon (R<->B invariant), T_EMISSION shadow byte + carry density per pixel; Picture from blending + rule30 emission texture (PPM/BMP writers); VideoSynth = layers + toroidal pixel transport (multiset-conserving) + superposition, FrameStream governed, deterministic video hashes. cqecmplx-verify 8/8.

Request-to-video demo + AVI codec: write_avi/decode_avi (stdlib uncompressed RGB24 RIFF, plays anywhere); examples/request_to_video.py runs the full chain (request -> Event Law receipt -> BBA-derived palette/seed -> pictures -> superperm-cursor-driven motion -> 90 frames @ 30fps -> AVI -> decoded back to exact request text -> run crystal). Verified live in 10.4s.

paint.py: color as the paint-by-numbers machine. Numbering = any system tool assigning each cell a small int (chart state 0-7, carry 0-8, anneal steps 0-3, VOA weight, digital root); Palette = number->paint lookup. paint(w,h,numbering,palette) unifies all picture constructors; deterministic. Demo BMPs: emission-law numbering under three different pots.

SceneForge harvested from historical donors: worldforge.py (original P5->B_obs->Rrho->B_soft->B_higgs->B_ward->Bridge compose, receipt-trailed), intent.py (Scene8 Intent-as-Slice stdlib: 240-root E8 lattice walks, UNITY/TERNARY/ATTRACTOR actions, system scoring, keyword projection inference), imagedb.py (real saved pictures indexed + deterministic casting). PixelForge/images.py: stdlib PNG decoder (zlib+all 5 filters, 5 color types) + BMP reader. examples/live_video.py: request->world->intent->REAL Windows images->90 frames@30fps AVI, frame-perfect decode, 13.3s live. Mounted as cqecmplx.engines.scene.

Genesis: the layered rule90+correction INVERSION. correction(t,x)=target(t+1,x) XOR rule90(target(t))(x) solved locally per bit-plane -> every picture (incl. real images) = seed row + correction field, regenerated hash-exactly by evolution (0.1s for 160x90x24 planes, int-bitmask rows). Correction-space algebra: blend_xor superposition, masked structure-match (top planes corrected, detail free-runs), request-reseeded generation, extra_rows continuation (image continues itself -> video). density() = nonlinearity fingerprint per channel. Requests now GENERATE pictures; the printout/generation distinction collapsed. cqecmplx-verify 9/9.

Metamorph: motion INSIDE correction space. morph_video A->B by progressive bit substitution under deterministic threshold sheets (hash/sweep/evolve - the evolve sheet is Rule-90-scheduled: the substrate times its own dissolve); every frame is a valid GenesisField regenerated by the rule; endpoints hash-exact to the real source images; mid-frames provably NOT pixel blends. transport_video moves one image's DNA (rotate-x, shift-t) and lets pixel motion EMERGE from evolution. 90-frame morph in 6.5s, deterministic video hashes. cqecmplx-verify 10/10.
